/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -flto=auto -fno-fat-lto-objects -fsanitize=undefined -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/logmind-daemon_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/daemon_core.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/plugin_api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/plugin_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/pipeline.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/log_buffer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/file_watcher.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/dbus_service.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/config_mgr.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/logmind-daemon.dir/src/daemon/vector_store.cpp.o" -o logmind-daemon  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6DBus.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
